response.step_by_step_log: The video starts with character dialogue and introduction. At 00:41, the song "POLKATIC FINALE" begins. I identified the song title "POLKATIC FINALE" from the on-screen text. I searched for "POLKATIC FINALE Japanese and English lyrics" to find the original lyrics. The primary contributor/composer is Chiaki Natsume. I have included the Japanese lyrics for the song. No direct, high-quality English translation was found, so the English lyrics field is set to null.
response.global_summary: A video clip showcasing a live performance of the song "POLKATIC FINALE" by Hololive VTuber Omaru Polka, joined by Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, and Momosuzu Nene. The performance is preceded and followed by brief character dialogue.

scenes.description: The song "POLKATIC FINALE" is performed by Omaru Polka, accompanied by Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, and Momosuzu Nene. Title appears on screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Omaru Polka, Shishiro Botan, Yukihana Lamy, Momosuzu Nene
